Name: Employee Email Address
Description: Compliant Pal's Pets administered repository of employee email addresses.
DescriptionPlainText: Compliant Pal's Pets administered repository of employee email addresses.

Name: Employee Name
Description: Name of employee, including First and Last Name
DescriptionPlainText: Name of employee, including First and Last Name

Name: Asset Acquisition
Description: An acquisition is the act of purchasing an asset.
DescriptionPlainText: An acquisition is the act of purchasing an asset.

Name: Asset Disposition
Description: A disposition is the act of selling or otherwise "disposing" of an asset.
DescriptionPlainText: A disposition is the act of selling or otherwise "disposing" of an asset.

Name: Inventory Disposition
Description: Inventory disposition represents the physical state of a unit or units.  e.g., Drawing down inventory for resale.
DescriptionPlainText: Inventory disposition represents the physical state of a unit or units.  e.g., Drawing down inventory for resale.

Name: Inventory Acquisition
Description: The acquisition of the inventory necessary to satisfy customers and internal distribution channels.
DescriptionPlainText: The acquisition of the inventory necessary to satisfy customers and internal distribution channels.

Name: Contractor Mailing Address
Description: The mailing address where the contractor can be communicated - either business or home
DescriptionPlainText: The mailing address where the contractor can be communicated - either business or home

Description: Name of contractor, including first and last name
DescriptionPlainText: Name of contractor, including first and last name

Name: Contractor Phone Number
Description: Contractor's phone number
DescriptionPlainText: Contractor's phone number

Name: Contractor Status
Description: Referring to the relationship between a contractor and employer - whether they are a  current or former contractor
DescriptionPlainText: Referring to the relationship between a contractor and employer - whether they are a  current or former contractor

Name: Contractor Website
Description: URL of the Contractor Website(s)

Name: Customer Mailing Address
Description: The mailing address where the customer can be communicated with - either business or home
DescriptionPlainText: The mailing address where the customer can be communicated with - either business or home

Name: Customer Name
Description: Name of customer, including first and last name
DescriptionPlainText: Name of customer, including first and last name

Name: Contractor Number
Description: The system-generated, or other distinguishing number, assigned by the organization.
DescriptionPlainText: The system-generated, or other distinguishing number, assigned by the organization.

Name: Customer Number
Description: The system-generated, or other distinguishing number, assigned by the organization to each customer.
DescriptionPlainText: The system-generated, or other distinguishing number, assigned by the organization to each customer.

Name: Customer Payment Type
Description: Payment type includes Cash, MasterCard, VISA, Cheque, and Paypal.
DescriptionPlainText: Payment type includes Cash, MasterCard, VISA, Cheque, and Paypal.

Name: Customer Credit Status
Description: Credit status includes a score from 600 to 850 and their credit worthiness.
DescriptionPlainText: Credit status includes a score from 600 to 850 and their credit worthiness.

Name: Customer Website
Description: The URL of the Customer's website(s)
DescriptionPlainText: The URL of the Customer's website(s)

Name: Employee User Account
Description: A user account is an identity created for a person in a computer or computing system. User accounts can also be created for machine entities, such as service accounts for running programs, system accounts for storing system files and processes, and root and administrator accounts for system administration.
DescriptionPlainText: A user account is an identity created for a person in a computer or computing system. User accounts can also be created for machine entities, such as service accounts for running programs, system accounts for storing system files and processes, and root and administrator accounts for system administration.

Name: Employee Mailing Address
Description: The mailing address where the employee can be communicated with - typically home address
DescriptionPlainText: The mailing address where the employee can be communicated with - typically home address

Name: Employee Status
Description: Referring to the relationship between an employee and employer - whether they are a current or former employer
DescriptionPlainText: Referring to the relationship between an employee and employer - whether they are a current or former employer

Name: Customer Invoice Number
Description: A unique number generated by a business issuing an invoice to a client. This number is included on the invoice and it is used for payment tracking purposes.
DescriptionPlainText: A unique number generated by a business issuing an invoice to a client. This number is included on the invoice and it is used for payment tracking purposes.

Name: Product Inventory SKU
Description: This is also known as a stock-keeping unit (SKU) which is a code that identifies products.
DescriptionPlainText: This is also known as a stock-keeping unit (SKU) which is a code that identifies products.

Name: Product AP Invoice
Description: Accounts Payable invoice recieved from Supplier for physical product for resale.
DescriptionPlainText: Accounts Payable invoice recieved from Supplier for physical product for resale.

Name: Supplier Status
Description: This indicates if the supplier is in good standing.
DescriptionPlainText: This indicates if the supplier is in good standing.

Name: Supplier Website
Description: URL of the Supplier Website and / or order procurement website.
DescriptionPlainText: URL of the Supplier Website and / or order procurement website.

Name: Supplier Payment Type
Description: Cash, EFT, VISA, Mastercard or PayPal

Description: The system-generated, or other distinguishing number, assigned by the organization.
